name: Zucchini Fiesta Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the zucchini and crookneck squash crosswise into 1/4 inch-thick slices.
2. Cut the squash in half crosswise.
3. Cut the cream cheese into 3/4-inch cubes.
4. Steam the zucchini and crookneck squash over boiling water until crisp-tender (about 3 minutes). Plunge into ice water to cool; drain well.
5. In a large bowl, combine lemon juice, oil, salt, ground cumin, drained squash, green onions, diced green chilies, pimento-stuffed olives, and cream cheese.
6. Peel and pit the avocado; cut into small cubes. Add to the salad and mix lightly.
7. To serve, arrange lettuce leaves on 4 salad plates. Mound equal portions of salad on each plate. Garnish each salad with a sprig of coriander.
